# Proxmox Tools

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî High-level Proxmox VE dashboards (read-only summaries).

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `proxmox_dashboard` | Proxmox VE dashboards: cluster overview, node health, guest health, storage summary, capacity/overcommit report. | `proxmox:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `proxmox_inventory` | Read-only Proxmox VE inventory: nodes, cluster status, VMs+LXC with config, templates, storage, networks, pools, snapshots, tasks, perf metrics. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `proxmox:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `proxmox_manage` | Approval-gated Proxmox VE management: clone-from-template, edit, power, snapshots, migrate, convert-to-template, delete (QEMU+LXC). | `proxmox:write` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "host": "",
  "token_id": "",
  "token_secret": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "host": "",
  "node": "",
  "port": 8006,
  "profiles": {},
  "timeout": 60,
  "token_id": "",
  "token_secret": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `host` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | Proxmox node FQDN or IP (any cluster node). |
| `node` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Optional default node name used when an action omits it and it cannot be resolved from the cluster. |
| `port` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `8006` | Proxmox API port (default 8006). |
| `profiles` | `object` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `{}` | Additional named Proxmox clusters. Each key is a profile name selectable via the 'profile' param; its value accepts the same fields as the top level. The top-level fields define the implicit 'default' cluster. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `60` | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 60). |
| `token_id` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | API token id in the form 'user@realm!tokenname' (e.g. 'svc-gsage@pve!gsage'). |
| `token_secret` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | `""` | API token secret / UUID (sensitive). |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `true` | Validate the Proxmox TLS certificate (default true). Set false for the default self-signed PVE certificate. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__HOST` | `host` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Proxmox node FQDN or IP (any cluster node). |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__NODE` | `node` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Optional default node name used when an action omits it and it cannot be resolved from the cluster. |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__PORT` | `port` | `integer` | `8006` | ‚Äî | Proxmox API port (default 8006). |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__PROFILES` | `profiles` | `object` | `{}` | ‚Äî | Additional named Proxmox clusters. Each key is a profile name selectable via the 'profile' param; its value accepts the same fields as the top level. The top-level fields define the implicit 'default' cluster. |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `60` | ‚Äî | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 60). |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__TOKEN_ID` | `token_id` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | API token id in the form 'user@realm!tokenname' (e.g. 'svc-gsage@pve!gsage'). |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__TOKEN_SECRET` | `token_secret` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | API token secret / UUID (sensitive). |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | ‚Äî | Validate the Proxmox TLS certificate (default true). Set false for the default self-signed PVE certificate. |
| `TOOL_PROXMOX_MANAGE__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | ‚Äî | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` ‚Äî useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `proxmox_inventory`

- **`cluster_status`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | ‚Äî | Name of the configured Proxmox cluster to query (a key under the config 'profiles' map). Omit (or 'default') for the primary cluster. |
  | `vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target guest VMID (unambiguous). Required by get_vm / list_snapshots / get_vm_metrics unless 'name' is given. |
  | `name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Target guest name (must be unique cluster-wide). Alternative to 'vmid'. |
  | `node` | `string` | ‚Äî | Node name. Required by get_node; optional filter for list_vms / list_storage / list_networks / recent_tasks. |
  | `kind` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_vms] Filter by guest kind: 'qemu' (KVM VMs) or 'lxc' (containers). Omit for both. |
  | `status` | `string` | ‚Äî | [list_vms] Filter by power status. |
  | `templates_only` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [list_vms] Return only templates (default false; list_vms excludes templates by default). |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Maximum items to return (default 100, hard cap 2000). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Bypass the Redis cache for this call (still writes the fresh value back). Cache TTL is 300s. |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Force CSV artifact even for small results. CSV is generated automatically over 100 rows. |
  | `export_json` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Persist the full result as a JSON artifact for programmatic post-processing. |

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `node` | `string` | ‚Äî | Node name. Required by get_node; optional filter for list_vms / list_storage / list_networks / recent_tasks. |

### `proxmox_manage`

- **`clone_from_template`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target guest VMID. For clone_from_template this is the SOURCE template/guest. Use this or 'name'. |
  | `new_vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] VMID for the new guest. Omit to auto-allocate the cluster's next free id. |
  | `new_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Name (QEMU) / hostname (LXC) of the new guest. |
  | `full` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Full clone (default true). False = linked clone (template + same storage required). |
  | `target_node` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, migrate_vm] Destination node. |
  | `storage` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Target storage for the new guest's disks (required for a full clone across storages). |
  | `pool` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Resource pool to add the new guest to. |
  | `power_on` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Start the new guest after cloning (and after applying customization). Default false. |
  | `ci_user` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init default user. |
  | `ci_password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init user password. |
  | `ci_sshkeys` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init SSH public key(s). |
  | `ipconfig0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] First NIC IP config. QEMU cloud-init form: 'ip=10.0.0.5/24,gw=10.0.0.1' or 'ip=dhcp'. |
  | `password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, LXC] root password for the container. |
  | `net0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template (LXC), edit_vm] Network device string, e.g. 'name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,ip=dhcp'. |

- **`convert_to_template`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | ‚Äî | Name of the configured Proxmox cluster to act on (a key under the config 'profiles' map). Omit (or 'default') for the primary cluster. |
  | `reason` | `string` | ‚úì | Free-form justification recorded in the audit log. |
  | `vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target guest VMID. For clone_from_template this is the SOURCE template/guest. Use this or 'name'. |
  | `name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Target guest name (unique cluster-wide). Alternative to 'vmid'. |
  | `new_vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] VMID for the new guest. Omit to auto-allocate the cluster's next free id. |
  | `new_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Name (QEMU) / hostname (LXC) of the new guest. |
  | `full` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Full clone (default true). False = linked clone (template + same storage required). |
  | `target_node` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, migrate_vm] Destination node. |
  | `storage` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Target storage for the new guest's disks (required for a full clone across storages). |
  | `pool` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Resource pool to add the new guest to. |
  | `power_on` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Start the new guest after cloning (and after applying customization). Default false. |
  | `ci_user` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init default user. |
  | `ci_password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init user password. |
  | `ci_sshkeys` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init SSH public key(s). |
  | `ipconfig0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] First NIC IP config. QEMU cloud-init form: 'ip=10.0.0.5/24,gw=10.0.0.1' or 'ip=dhcp'. |
  | `password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, LXC] root password for the container. |
  | `net0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template (LXC), edit_vm] Network device string, e.g. 'name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,ip=dhcp'. |
  | `cores` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] New CPU core count. |
  | `memory_mb` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] New memory size in MB. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Set the guest description/notes. |
  | `disk` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Disk to grow (e.g. 'scsi0', 'virtio0', 'rootfs'). Requires disk_size. |
  | `disk_size` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Grow amount or absolute size, e.g. '+10G' (add 10 GB) or '50G'. Grow only ‚Äî Proxmox cannot shrink. |
  | `snapshot_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot, rollback_snapshot, delete_snapshot] Snapshot name. |
  | `snapshot_description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot] Optional description. |
  | `snapshot_vmstate` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot, QEMU] Include RAM state (default false). |
  | `online` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm] Perform a live/online migration (default true for running guests). |
  | `with_local_disks` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm, QEMU] Migrate local disks to the target node's storage (default false). |

  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Set the guest description/notes. |
  | `disk` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Disk to grow (e.g. 'scsi0', 'virtio0', 'rootfs'). Requires disk_size. |
  | `disk_size` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Grow amount or absolute size, e.g. '+10G' (add 10 GB) or '50G'. Grow only ‚Äî Proxmox cannot shrink. |

- **`migrate_vm`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `target_node` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, migrate_vm] Destination node. |
  | `online` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm] Perform a live/online migration (default true for running guests). |
  | `with_local_disks` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm, QEMU] Migrate local disks to the target node's storage (default false). |

- **`reset`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | ‚Äî | Name of the configured Proxmox cluster to act on (a key under the config 'profiles' map). Omit (or 'default') for the primary cluster. |
  | `reason` | `string` | ‚úì | Free-form justification recorded in the audit log. |
  | `vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target guest VMID. For clone_from_template this is the SOURCE template/guest. Use this or 'name'. |
  | `name` | `string` | ‚Äî | Target guest name (unique cluster-wide). Alternative to 'vmid'. |
  | `new_vmid` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] VMID for the new guest. Omit to auto-allocate the cluster's next free id. |
  | `new_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Name (QEMU) / hostname (LXC) of the new guest. |
  | `full` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Full clone (default true). False = linked clone (template + same storage required). |
  | `target_node` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, migrate_vm] Destination node. |
  | `storage` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Target storage for the new guest's disks (required for a full clone across storages). |
  | `pool` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Resource pool to add the new guest to. |
  | `power_on` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] Start the new guest after cloning (and after applying customization). Default false. |
  | `ci_user` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init default user. |
  | `ci_password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init user password. |
  | `ci_sshkeys` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, QEMU] cloud-init SSH public key(s). |
  | `ipconfig0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template] First NIC IP config. QEMU cloud-init form: 'ip=10.0.0.5/24,gw=10.0.0.1' or 'ip=dhcp'. |
  | `password` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template, LXC] root password for the container. |
  | `net0` | `string` | ‚Äî | [clone_from_template (LXC), edit_vm] Network device string, e.g. 'name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,ip=dhcp'. |
  | `cores` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] New CPU core count. |
  | `memory_mb` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] New memory size in MB. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Set the guest description/notes. |
  | `disk` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Disk to grow (e.g. 'scsi0', 'virtio0', 'rootfs'). Requires disk_size. |
  | `disk_size` | `string` | ‚Äî | [edit_vm] Grow amount or absolute size, e.g. '+10G' (add 10 GB) or '50G'. Grow only ‚Äî Proxmox cannot shrink. |
  | `snapshot_name` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot, rollback_snapshot, delete_snapshot] Snapshot name. |
  | `snapshot_description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot] Optional description. |
  | `snapshot_vmstate` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [create_snapshot, QEMU] Include RAM state (default false). |
  | `online` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm] Perform a live/online migration (default true for running guests). |
  | `with_local_disks` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | [migrate_vm, QEMU] Migrate local disks to the target node's storage (default false). |

## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `proxmox_dashboard` | `proxmox:read` |
| `proxmox_inventory` | `proxmox:read` |
| `proxmox_manage` | `proxmox:write` |

## Operational metadata

| Tool | Version | Rate limit/min | Timeout (s) | Circuit breaker | Background | Multi-config |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `proxmox_dashboard` | `1.0.0` | 20 | 180 | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚úì |
| `proxmox_inventory` | `1.0.0` | 60 | 120 | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚úì |
| `proxmox_manage` | `1.0.0` | 20 | 600 | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚úì |
